2. Parse objects for "doi" and map to citedBy.doi -- use helper to convert to pmid and fill in citaton object
3. No "Pubmed-ID" or "doi", parse object (title=name, etc. Ignore mesh and topic)

3. If a 'strain' level NCBI Tax ID is NOT available, THEN use the 'species' level NCBI tax ID for the infectiousAgent.identifier field
